evals.prompt: pull down the review on Gusto/gdev-wish#603 and let's work through the feedback
evals.expected_output: A structured doc listing each unresolved review thread with a verdict (valid/invalid/nice-to-have/needs-clarification), reasoning, and plan. Verdicts should be tentative; no code changes yet.

evals.prompt: what did rubberduck203 say on my PR at https://github.com/Gusto/gdev-wish/pull/603 ? I want to address their feedback specifically
evals.expected_output: Structured doc scoped to rubberduck203's threads (other reviewers' threads can be deferred or omitted). Each thread has a tentative verdict + reasoning + plan.

evals.prompt: I haven't looked at https://github.com/Gusto/gdev-wish/pull/603 in a while. Catch me up and let's address what's left on it.
evals.expected_output: Structured doc plus a short (1-2 sentence) PR summary, since the context is cold. Verdicts tentative; deep-dive available on request.
